title: React Todo App
description: A complete todo application built with React and Redux. Features include task creation, editing, deletion, and persistent storage using localStorage.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with product catalog, shopping cart, and checkout functionality. Built with Vue.js for frontend and Node.js for backend.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Real-time weather dashboard that displays current conditions, hourly forecast, and 7-day forecast. Uses OpenWeatherMap API and responsive design.

title: Music Streaming App
description: Interactive music streaming application with playlist management, user authentication, and real-time audio playback. Features search and recommendations.

title: Social Media Analytics
description: Analytics dashboard for tracking social media metrics across multiple platforms. Includes data visualization, performance reports, and trend analysis.
